compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<resignation notice>> to boss: quitting job
response:
**Subject: Resignation Notice**

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification of my resignation from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day, typically two weeks from the date of the email].

I want to sincerely thank you for the opportunity to be part of the team. I have greatly valued the experience and professional growth I have gained during my time here.

To ensure a smooth transition, I am committed to completing my current projects and responsibilities to the best of my ability over the next two weeks. I am also happy to assist in training a replacement or documenting my processes.

I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
